name: HijackKV: New Threat in Position-Independent KV Cache Reuse
summary: arXiv:2607.19957v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Key-Value (KV) cache reduces inference latency in large language models (LLMs). Traditional prefix-based reuse has low cache hit rates across infer...
description: arXiv:2607.19957v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Key-Value (KV) cache reduces inference latency in large language models (LLMs). Traditional prefix-based reuse has low cache hit rates across inference requests because it requires exact token and position matches. To improve efficiency, recent system optimizations introduce position-independent KV reuse, allowing KV cache to be reused whenever...
author: Yichi Zhang, Zhiqi Wang, Huan Zhang, Yuchen Yang
